model.label: Gemini 3 Flash
model.description: Google • Fast Gemini model optimized for low-latency reasoning, multimodal inputs, and tool use.

pick.rationale: Arizona enters the tournament as a dominant 1-seed, boasting a top-10 offense and a top-5 defense that makes them overwhelming favorites against an LIU squad ranked outside the top 200 in efficiency. While the Wildcats are monitoring the health of star freshman Koa Peat, their elite depth and experience in the Big 12 provide a massive talent advantage that the Sharks cannot match. Expect Arizona to control the interior and use their transition game to secure a comfortable victory in this 1/16 matchup.

reasoningStep.title: Arizona vs. LIU Matchup Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Arizona is a top-tier 1-seed with elite efficiency metrics, while LIU is a 16-seed with a significant talent deficit.
evidence: Arizona ranks 3rd nationally in both KenPom and Bart Torvik, with an adjusted efficiency margin of +37.56.
LIU ranks 216th in KenPom with an efficiency margin of -3.95.
Arizona's top-5 defensive ranking and 31-2 record provide a massive safety net against a 16-seed.
Star freshman Koa Peat's injury is a minor concern, but Arizona's depth is sufficient to handle this opening round.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.

Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
